sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what kinds of machines or solutions the company manufactures and include a primary contact CTA.
Machine summary must describe concrete machine categories or solution types, not generic 'high quality solutions' copy.
Industries summary should name relevant customer segments or use cases when known.
Trust proof must rely on real references, visible company details or concrete production capabilities; do not invent certifications or delivery volumes.
Final contact CTA should invite quote request, technical discussion or project inquiry without repeating the same claims verbatim.
Products intro must connect the company to its machine offering and typical customer needs.
Product list items must be concrete and grouped by machine type, function or application area.
Customization section should explain configurable options, adaptation to requirements or project-based delivery when applicable.
Avoid presenting machines as off-the-shelf products if the business mainly works with tailored manufacturing.
Service intro must clarify what happens after delivery, such as maintenance, spare parts or technical support.
Service list must be specific about support types rather than generic promises of availability.
Support process should explain how customers initiate service or technical cases and what contact path to use.
Opening hours may appear when support times are actually provided in the dossier.
About story must be specific about the company, its manufacturing focus and how it works with customers.
Production capability should cover workshop, design, assembly or testing capacity only when supported by provided data.
Team section should highlight relevant roles or expertise when available.
Do not use vague prestige language in place of concrete competence or facilities.
Contact info must include real phone, email and address details when available and must not use placeholders.
Contact form should support quote requests or technical inquiries in a straightforward way.
Map should be shown when location data exists.
Contact CTA should reinforce the next step without making unsupported response-time promises.
